import asyncio
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '/Users/tangxuguang/project/git/SenseWorld/backend'\)

async def main\(\):
    from app.core.database import async_session_maker
    from sqlalchemy import text
    async with async_session_maker\(\) as db:
        result = await db.execute\(text\('SELECT email, is_admin FROM users LIMIT 5'\)\)
        rows = result.fetchall\(\)
        for row in rows:
            print\(row\)

asyncio.run\(main\(\)\)
")

Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "
import asyncio
from app.services.tts_service import TTSService

async def test\(\):
    svc = TTSService\(\)
    print\('model:', svc.model\)
    print\('api_key:', svc.api_key[:10] if svc.api_key else None\)
    try:
        data = await svc.synthesize\('你好'\)
        print\('Success, bytes:', len\(data\)\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\('Error:', type\(e\).__name__, str\(e\)\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
")

Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "
import asyncio
from app.services.asr_service import ASRService

async def test\(\):
    svc = ASRService\(\)
    with open\('/tmp/test_tts.wav', 'rb'\) as f:
        audio_data = f.read\(\)
    result = await svc.transcribe\(audio_data, language='zh', filename='test.wav'\)
    print\('text:', result.text\)
    print\('duration_ms:', result.duration_ms\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
")

Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "
import asyncio, base64
from openai import OpenAI
from app.config import settings

client = OpenAI\(
    api_key=settings.tts_api_key,
    base_url='https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1',
\)

with open\('/tmp/test_tts.wav', 'rb'\) as f:
    audio_b64 = base64.b64encode\(f.read\(\)\).decode\(\)

completion = client.chat.completions.create\(
    model='qwen3-asr-flash',
    messages=[{'role': 'user', 'content': [{'type': 'input_audio', 'input_audio': {'data': f'data:audio/wav;base64,{audio_b64}'}}]}],
    extra_body={'asr_options': {'language': 'zh', 'enable_itn': False}},
\)
usage = completion.usage
print\('usage type:', type\(usage\)\)
print\('usage:', usage\)
print\('model_extra:', usage.model_extra if hasattr\(usage, 'model_extra'\) else 'N/A'\)
print\('seconds attr:', getattr\(usage, 'seconds', 'NOT FOUND'\)\)
")
